Application deadline

These deadlines apply to applications for courses starting in Michaelmas 2026, Lent 2027 and Easter 2027.
matchedText: Course closed for this cycle: Human-Inspired Artificial Intelligence is no longer accepting applications for this cycle. It is expected to re-open for new applications in early September.
matchedTextAfter: This MPhil in Human-Inspired Artificial Intelligence is designed to equip the next generation of AI researchers, technologists, and leaders with the skills needed to develop human-centred, human-compatible, responsible and socially and globally beneficial AI technologies.
